calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Jacqueline K. Loveless, Esq. for Plaintiff: Victor F. Amenta, Willie Cain, Morman D. larson and Perry L. Scott.
Dismissal without prejudice as to Plaintiff: William Kenneth Green, filed with Clerk's Office today.
After considering the Declaration of David R. Donadio in support of Default Judgment, and hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc. as follows:
Total Interest amount owing to the Plaintiffs of $195.92
Costs $420.50.
See scanned doc. for details of Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2006 Continued To Dec-04-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Continued To Nov-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Paul Vailencourt, Esq. for Plaintiff: Victor F. Amenta, et at.
Order waiving appearance of Plaintiffs is in file.
Matter is continued to Nov. 16, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for the Plaintiffs to file Declarations in support of the Default Judgment.
